title: [TUI] Phase 4: input widget
description: Build widgets/input.rs per spec: InputState, InputAction, handle_key with all required keybindings, Input render widget with cursor positioning. Phase 4 of crates/tui/ library.

logs.msg: Implemented InputState + Input widget. All readline keybindings, history, kill ring, unicode-aware. 71 passing tests.

Phase 4 complete: cursor positioning, Terminal Drop guard, event handlers ported, slash commands, tool result sync, auto-scroll, dead code cleanup. But still not at functional parity — pickers don't render, completers missing, tool expansion cosmetic only.
